prompt: Create a cinematic anime-style sci-fi illustration of a young woman in a high-tech server room, viewed from behind and slightly to the side as she operates a large transparent holographic touchscreen. She has blonde hair tied in a low ponytail with loose bangs, pale skin, and a focused posture, one arm extended with her index finger touching a glowing circular interface. She wears a black sleeveless crop top and black frayed denim shorts, giving the scene a sleek casual hacker/agent look. The environment is a dark futuristic data center corridor with tall server racks on both sides, cyan-blue LED strips, cables, illuminated panels, a metallic floor reflecting the lights, overhead rectangular light bars, and a sealed sci-fi door in the distance. The holographic display dominates the left side of the composition and contains dense technical UI graphics, circuit patterns, data panels, and one large warning headline in bold pink-white capital letters reading VALORIAN INVASION PLAN. Use dramatic blue cyberpunk lighting, crisp linework, polished anime rendering, detailed background perspective, luminous transparent glass effects, and a tense secret-mission atmosphere. Wide 16:9 composition, medium-full body view from behind, high detail, sharp focus, no extra characters.
